old_message1:
Your next project just got more valuable. Here is the current YSWS lineup, ranked by what your time is worth.

*Jackpot* leads the pack at *$6 per hour*. You have until July 7, 2026 to ship something great, and this deadline could get extended based on the latest Slack updates. That is the strongest rate on the board right now.

*Carnival* clocks in at *$4 per hour*. Build browser extensions, plugins, or widgets and pick up prizes. This one runs indefinitely through 2099, so you are not pressed for time. Check it out at <https://carnival.hackclub.com/|carnival.hackclub.com> or join <https://hackclub.slack.com/archives/C091ZRTMF16|#carnival>.

*Remixed* offers *$3.13 per hour* through April 30, 2026. That is the hard stop, with no extensions planned.

*FlavorTown* wraps up April 30, 2026. Dollars per hour is not available, though tokens convert to cash at $0.20 each. Cook your personal projects and win free prizes. Hop into <https://hackclub.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C09MPB8NE8H|#flavortown> or visit <https://flavortown.hackclub.com/?ref=ysws-catalog|flavortown.hackclub.com> to get started.
